a.style: font-size: 0.9rem; color: var(--text-secondary); padding: 8px; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.03); border-radius: 6px; border: 1px solid var(--border-color);

div.p: NeoMax is your ultimate destination for the latest movie trailers, reviews, and cinematic news. Experience movies like never before with our premium dark-mode interface.

ul.style: display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 12px; font-size: 0.9rem; color: var(--text-secondary);
display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 12px; font-size: 0.9rem; color: var(--text-secondary);

div.p: Join our community and get the latest updates delivered to your inbox.

input.style: flex: 1; background: #121214; border: 1px solid var(--border-color); padding: 12px; border-radius: 8px; color: white;

div.div: © 2026 NeoMax Cinematic. All Rights Reserved. Designed for Movie Enthusiasts.
